LIVE ▸
"By His stripes you were healed."— 1 Peter 2:24·"God so loved the world He gave His only Son."— John 3:16·"I am the Lord who heals you."— Exodus 15:26·"My word is medicine to all your flesh."— Proverbs 4:22·Gospel Truth airs Mon–Fri at 7 AM & 10 PM EST on Daystar & TBN·"The same Spirit that raised Jesus dwells in you."— Romans 8:11·Healing Is Here Conference — August 12–15 · Register Now·"Bless the Lord who heals all your diseases."— Psalm 103:3·"By His stripes you were healed."— 1 Peter 2:24·"God so loved the world He gave His only Son."— John 3:16·"I am the Lord who heals you."— Exodus 15:26·"My word is medicine to all your flesh."— Proverbs 4:22·Gospel Truth airs Mon–Fri at 7 AM & 10 PM EST on Daystar & TBN·"The same Spirit that raised Jesus dwells in you."— Romans 8:11·Healing Is Here Conference — August 12–15 · Register Now·"Bless the Lord who heals all your diseases."— Psalm 103:3·

Audio Archives

Audio Teachings Library

Stream hundreds of Andrew Wommack's core teaching series — absolutely free. The audio player persists as you browse.

Featured Series

Spirit, Soul & Body: Part 1

Andrew Wommack · 42:18

01

Spirit, Soul & Body

Spirit, Soul & Body: Part 1

Understand the relational structure of your spirit, soul, and body. Learn how your spirit was instantly perfected at salvation.

42:18
02

Spirit, Soul & Body

Spirit, Soul & Body: Part 2

Why your physical senses compete with your born-again spirit — and how the Word of God serves as a spiritual mirror.

45:30
03

Believer's Authority

The Believer's Authority: Part 1

Explore the authority God has delegated to you as a believer. Stop begging God to do what He already commanded you to do.

38:10
04

Believer's Authority

The Believer's Authority: Part 2

How to stand against satanic operations and enforce the victory Jesus already won.

40:15
05

You've Already Got It

You've Already Got It!: Part 1

God has already blessed you with all spiritual blessings in Christ. Your healing and provision are waiting to manifest.

44:50
06

You've Already Got It

You've Already Got It!: Part 2

How to bypass unbelief and open the channel of faith so God's power flows from your spirit into your circumstances.

43:10
07

Prayer & Communion

A Better Way to Pray: Part 1

Andrew challenges conventional prayer. Prayer is not about twisting God's arm — it's about communion and releasing His grace.

37:40
08

Prayer & Communion

A Better Way to Pray: Part 2

Commanding prayer vs pleading prayer. Harness the power of faith and declare God's promises over your health.

39:55

Teaching God's unconditional love and grace to the world — free of charge since 1978.
